name: SpyderXPro / SpyderEngage / SpyderX Elite
description: Datacolor monitor calibration software for SpyderX and Spyder X2 colorimeters

extraction.note: Zendesk-based SPA behind Cloudflare bot detection. Requires headless browser or manual lookup.
extraction.fallback_third_party: Check MacUpdater, Homebrew, or other tracker databases for SpyderX version

changelog.note: No public changelog or release notes page found

release_date.note: No programmatic release date available. Check MacUpdater database or other trackers.

notes: HARDEST app to track. Datacolor uses aggressive bot protection: Cloudflare on the support portal, CDN blocks direct access, no API, no Sparkle, no Homebrew cask, no Mac App Store. Software is free but requires SpyderX hardware to function. Best approach: monitor third-party databases (MacUpdater, MacInformant) for version changes. Version schemes are inconsistent (SpyderX: ~5.9, Spyder X2: ~6.6).
